programmes.show_description: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.
James Lambiassi discovers Yamagata's long tradition of wooden architecture, and contemporary uses for timber.

Tokyo's Akihabara is a hub of maid cafe culture - once catering mainly to male customers, these cafes now also attract women and families. For three days we go inside to explore one cafe's appeal.

NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.
Experienced anchor Del Irani has a cutting-edge dialogue with a first-class guest on current affairs topics.
